fields.trading_as: BOSS D trading as KeyGuy Centurion
fields.hero_subtext: Mobile car key repair, reprogramming and diagnostics across Centurion & Pretoria. We come to you — home, office or roadside. No towing, no dealership.
fields.meta_title: KeyGuy Centurion | Mobile Car Key Repair, Reprogramming & Diagnostics
fields.meta_description: Mobile car key repair, reprogramming and diagnostics in Centurion and Pretoria. We come to you — no towing, no dealership. Call or WhatsApp 076 827 4530.

fields.title: Key Repair
fields.description: Faulty key? Dead remote? We repair and reprogram your existing key on-site — shells, transponders, buttons and remotes for all major vehicle brands.

fields.title: Key Reprogramming
fields.description: Transponders, smart keys, remote head keys and proximity fobs reprogrammed to your vehicle's ECU. Tested and verified before we leave.

fields.title: Key Cutting
fields.description: Precision cutting for spare keys and duplicates. Standard, laser-cut and high-security key profiles cut with professional equipment at your location.

fields.title: Mobile Diagnostics
fields.description: On-site fault code scanning and vehicle diagnostics. We come to your location to identify electrical issues, immobiliser faults and key-related problems.

fields.title: Remote & Fob Repair
fields.description: Broken shell, faulty buttons or dead remote? We repair and restore your existing key remote on-site. If the electronics are alive, we fix it — fast and affordable.

fields.title: Spare Key Cutting
fields.description: Get a spare cut and programmed from your existing working key while we are on-site. A spare costs far less than an emergency call-out.

fields.body: My car key stopped starting the car at 7am before work. KeyGuy was on-site within 45 minutes, diagnosed and reprogrammed the transponder in under an hour. Professional and much cheaper than the dealership.
My BMW X3 remote stopped working completely. KeyGuy came to my office in Pretoria East, reprogrammed everything on-site in under an hour. Much cheaper than the dealership. Highly recommend.
Quick, honest, and knowledgeable. He diagnosed the fault on my Audi key remote, fixed it on-site, and charged a very fair price. No upselling, no drama. Highly recommended.

fields.question: Do you work on all car makes and models?
fields.answer: Yes. We cover VW, Toyota, BMW, Mercedes, Audi, Ford, Hyundai, Kia, Renault, Nissan, Mazda and more. Call us with your make, model and year and we will confirm before coming out.

fields.question: How quickly can you get to me?
fields.answer: Response time depends on your location and current workload. Call or WhatsApp for an honest ETA — we never give false promises.

fields.question: Do I need to tow my car to you?
fields.answer: No. We come to you — home, office, shopping centre or roadside. Our van is fully equipped to handle the job on-site.

fields.question: How much does it cost?
fields.answer: Pricing depends on the service and your vehicle. We quote upfront — no surprises, no hidden call-out fees. Our prices are significantly lower than dealership rates.

fields.question: What types of key problems do you fix?
fields.answer: We repair and reprogram faulty transponders, dead remotes, broken key shells, flip key mechanisms and proximity fobs. If your key is damaged or not communicating with your vehicle, we can fix it on-site.

fields.question: Do you offer mobile diagnostics?
fields.answer: Yes. We come to your location with a professional diagnostic scanner to read fault codes, identify immobiliser issues and advise on next steps — all without you needing to visit a workshop.
